create-pdf-title-page.title: Create PDF with Title Page and Custom Font
create-pdf-title-page.description: Creates a new PDF document, adds a title page with custom font, size, and color, and sets the document title metadata.

insert-highres-image.title: Insert High-Resolution Image into PDF Page with Absolute Positioning
insert-highres-image.description: Demonstrates how to add a high‑resolution image to a PDF page at specific absolute coordinates using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

generate-searchable-pdf.title: Generate Searchable PDF from Scanned Images
generate-searchable-pdf.description: Creates a searchable PDF by adding an invisible OCR text layer over scanned image pages.

add-multi-level-toc.title: Add Multi‑Level Table of Contents to PDF
add-multi-level-toc.description: Creates a Table of Contents page at the beginning of an existing PDF, adding hierarchical entries with links to the corresponding pages.

remove-page-renumber.title: Remove a Specific Page from PDF and Renumber Remaining Pages
remove-page-renumber.description: Demonstrates how to delete a given page from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET; the library automatically renumbers the remaining pages.

insert-blank-cover-page.title: Insert Blank Cover Page at Beginning of PDF
insert-blank-cover-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert an empty page at the start of an existing PDF to serve as a cover sheet.

replace-word-pdf.title: Replace All Occurrences of a Word in PDF
replace-word-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to replace every occurrence of a specific word in a PDF while preserving the original formatting using TextFragmentAbsorber.

extract-images-pdf-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-pdf-png.description: Extracts all images from a PDF document and saves each as a PNG file while preserving the original resolution.

add-digital-signature.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF
add-digital-signature.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature form field to a PDF and sign it using a self‑signed certificate.

validate-pdfa-1a.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A‑1A compliance and generate report
validate-pdfa-1a.description: Loads a PDF, validates it against the PDF/A‑1A standard, writes a detailed validation log, and reports the compliance status.

validate-pdfa-1b.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1B compliance and log issues
validate-pdfa-1b.description: Loads a PDF, validates it against PDF/A‑1B, writes a log of non‑conformant elements, and reports the compliance status.

clean-pdf-metadata.title: Remove Metadata and Embedded Content from PDF
clean-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to strip hidden metadata, JavaScript, and embedded files from a PDF to reduce its file size using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-expiration.title: Set PDF Expiration Date with JavaScript
set-pdf-expiration.description: Demonstrates how to embed a document‑level JavaScript that makes a PDF expire on a specific date.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten PDF Form Fields to Static Content
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Demonstrates how to remove interactive form fields from a PDF and convert their values into static page content using Aspose.Pdf.

detect-incremental-updates.title: Detect Incremental Updates and Modification in PDF
detect-incremental-updates.description: Loads a PDF, checks for incremental updates, and compares original and modified IDs to determine if the file was changed after creation.

monitor-pdf-generation-progress.title: Monitor PDF Generation Progress with Aspose.Pdf
monitor-pdf-generation-progress.description: Shows how to attach a custom progress handler to a SaveOptions object to receive conversion progress events while saving a PDF to HTML, updating a console progress indicator.

add-accessibility-tags.title: Add Accessibility Tags to Headings, Paragraphs, and Tables
add-accessibility-tags.description: Demonstrates how to tag headings, paragraphs, and a table in an existing PDF to improve screen‑reader compatibility.

attach-pdf-portfolio.title: Attach PDF Portfolio File with Description
attach-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to attach a PDF file as a portfolio entry to another PDF and set a custom description for the attached file.

read-update-pdf-metadata.title: Read and Update PDF Metadata (Author and Title)
read-update-pdf-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, reads its author and title metadata, updates these fields, and saves the document.

apply-password-protection.title: Apply Password Protection to PDF
apply-password-protection.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF with user and owner passwords and set specific permissions using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

print-pdf-document.title: Print PDF Document Directly from .NET
print-pdf-document.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF and send it to the printer using Aspose.Pdf's built‑in PdfViewer.

interrupt-resume-pdf-save.title: Interrupt and Resume Large PDF Save Operation
interrupt-resume-pdf-save.description: Shows how to interrupt a long‑running PDF save using IInterruptMonitor and later resume the save operation.

embed-zugferd-xml.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF and Verify
embed-zugferd-xml.description: Demonstrates embedding a ZUGFeRD invoice XML file into a PDF using BindXml and checking its presence via GetCatalogValue.

javascript-alert-on-open.title: Add JavaScript Alert on PDF Open
javascript-alert-on-open.description: Demonstrates how to embed a JavaScript action that shows an alert dialog when the PDF is opened.

create-pdf-from-html-strings.title: Create PDF from Multiple HTML Strings with Custom Rendering Options
create-pdf-from-html-strings.description: Demonstrates how to convert a collection of HTML strings into a single PDF document using HtmlLoadOptions for custom page settings.

add-styled-table.title: Add Styled Table with Alternating Row Colors to PDF
add-styled-table.description: Creates a PDF, adds a table with borders and alternating row background colors, and saves the document.

add-external-hyperlink-annotation.title: Add External Hyperlink Annotation to PDF
add-external-hyperlink-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to insert a link annotation that opens an external website when clicked.

replace-image-pdf.title: Replace Image in PDF Page While Preserving Layout
replace-image-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to replace an existing image on a PDF page with a new image using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the original layout intact.

add-page-numbers-footer.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF Footer
add-page-numbers-footer.description: Demonstrates how to add dynamic page numbers to the footer of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.title: Merge Two PDFs Preserving Bookmarks
merge-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.description: Merges two PDF files into a single document while keeping the bookmarks (outlines) from both source PDFs.

extract-text-page-range.title: Extract Text from PDF Page Range to Text File
extract-text-page-range.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from a specific range of pages in a PDF and save it as a plain text file using Aspose.Pdf.

add-company-logo-header.title: Add Company Logo Header to PDF Pages
add-company-logo-header.description: Shows how to place a company logo as a header on every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

set-pdf-document-properties.title: Set PDF Document Properties (Creation Date, Modification Date, Keywords)
set-pdf-document-properties.description: Demonstrates how to set the creation date, modification date, and custom keywords in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

embed-ttf-font.title: Create PDF with Embedded TrueType Font
embed-ttf-font.description: Creates a PDF document, embeds a TrueType font (Arial) and adds text using the embedded font to ensure consistent rendering across devices.

semi-transparent-watermark.title: Apply Semi-Transparent Watermark Overlay to PDF
semi-transparent-watermark.description: Demonstrates adding a semi‑transparent image watermark to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

clickable-toc.title: Create PDF with Clickable Table of Contents
clickable-toc.description: Generates a PDF containing a Table of Contents page where each entry links to its corresponding section heading.

remove-all-annotations.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, deletes every annotation on each page, and saves a clean copy.

add-signature-field.title: Add Signature Form Field with Custom Appearance
add-signature-field.description: Demonstrates adding a signature form field to a PDF and customizing its appearance to match the document style.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and restrict printing and copying
encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256 encryption while disabling printing and copying permissions.

create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio from Multiple PDFs
create-pdf-portfolio.description: Demonstrates how to combine several PDF files into a single PDF portfolio (package) using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-custom-xml-metadata.title: Add Custom XML Metadata to PDF Document
add-custom-xml-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add custom XML metadata and a custom dictionary entry to a PDF's document information using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-line-annotation.title: Add Line Annotation with Custom Color and Thickness
add-line-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a line annotation to a PDF page, customize its color and thickness, and save the updated document.

replace-pdf-page-with-html.title: Replace PDF Page with HTML‑Generated Page
replace-pdf-page-with-html.description: Demonstrates how to replace a specific page in an existing PDF with a new page created from HTML content using Aspose.Pdf's HTML‑to‑PDF conversion.

add-javascript-calculation-form.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Fields
add-javascript-calculation-form.description: Demonstrates adding two text box fields and a calculated field that shows their sum using a JavaScript action.

create-dynamic-table.title: Create Dynamic Table in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
create-dynamic-table.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a table whose rows are generated from a DataTable, automatically expanding to fit the data.

create-zugferd-invoice.title: Create ZUGFeRD Invoice PDF with Embedded XML
create-zugferd-invoice.description: Generates a PDF invoice compliant with the ZUGFeRD standard and embeds the corresponding XML data.

clickable-index-pdf.title: Create PDF with Clickable Index (Table of Contents)
clickable-index-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to build a PDF that contains a table of contents where each entry links to its corresponding section page using internal GoTo actions.

add-background-image-template.title: Add Background Image to Every PDF Page Using a Reusable Template
add-background-image-template.description: Demonstrates how to create a single‑page template containing a background image and stamp it onto each page of an existing PDF.

add-signature-appearance.title: Add Signature Appearance with Custom Image on Last Page
add-signature-appearance.description: Demonstrates adding a signature field and placing a custom image as its appearance on the last page of a PDF.

extract-embedded-files.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files.description: Shows how to open a PDF portfolio and extract all embedded files, saving each to a specified directory.

magazine-multi-column.title: Create Magazine-Style Multi-Column PDF with Advertisement
magazine-multi-column.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with a two‑column layout for article text and insert an advertisement image using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-readonly-text-field.title: Add Read‑Only Text Field with Default Value to PDF
add-readonly-text-field.description: Creates a PDF, adds a text box form field with a default value and sets it to read‑only, then saves the document.

email-link-pdf.title: Create PDF with Clickable Email Link
email-link-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a clickable email link that opens the default mail client using a LinkAnnotation with GoToURIAction.

add-captions-below-images.title: Add Captions Below Images in PDF
add-captions-below-images.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over images on each page of a PDF and add a styled text caption below each image using TextBuilder and TextParagraph.

add-popup-note-annotation.title: Add Pop‑up Note Annotation to PDF
add-popup-note-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky‑note annotation with an associated pop‑up window that displays additional information when the user hovers over it.

pdf-header-date-javascript.title: Create PDF with Header Date using JavaScript
pdf-header-date-javascript.description: Creates a PDF with a header that shows the current date by adding a shared DateField and setting its value via JavaScript.

add-digital-signature-timestamp.title: Add Digital Signature with Timestamp to PDF
add-digital-signature-timestamp.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF and attach a trusted timestamp from a TSA using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

create-5x7-postcard-pdf.title: Create PDF with Custom 5x7 Inch Page Size
create-5x7-postcard-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a custom 5x7 inch page size suitable for postcard printing.

add-semi-transparent-background.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Color to PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-background.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent colored rectangle as a background to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

insert-page-into-pdf.title: Insert Page from One PDF into Another at Specific Position
insert-page-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a page from a source PDF into a target PDF at a given position using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

create-pdf-form-dropdown.title: Create PDF Form with Dropdown List
create-pdf-form-dropdown.description: Creates a PDF document containing a form with a dropdown list populated from an array.

add-footer-total-page-count.title: Add Footer with Total Page Count to PDF
add-footer-total-page-count.description: Demonstrates adding a custom footer that displays the current page number and total page count on each page of a PDF.

remove-javascript-actions.title: Remove All JavaScript Actions from a PDF
remove-javascript-actions.description: Demonstrates how to strip every JavaScript action from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-link-annotation-open-attachment.title: Add Link Annotation to Open PDF Attachment
add-link-annotation-open-attachment.description: Demonstrates how to embed a PDF file as an attachment and create a link annotation that opens the attachment when clicked.

rotated-landscape-page.title: Create PDF with Rotated Landscape Page
rotated-landscape-page.description: Demonstrates how to create a new PDF and rotate a page to landscape orientation using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-checkbox-checked.title: Add Checkbox Form Field with Default Checked State
add-checkbox-checked.description: Creates a PDF with a checkbox form field and sets it to be checked by default.

extract-pdf-outline.title: Extract PDF Outline Hierarchy and Print as Tree
extract-pdf-outline.description: Loads a PDF, reads its bookmark (outline) hierarchy and prints it to the console as an indented tree structure.

rich-table.title: Create PDF with Table Containing Rich Text Formatting
rich-table.description: Demonstrates how to build a table in a PDF and apply different text formatting to individual cells using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-line-stamp-annotation.title: Add Line Stamp Annotation to PDF Page
add-line-stamp-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a rubber stamp annotation with custom text across a PDF page.

insert-automatic-page-numbers.title: Insert Automatic Page Numbers with Pagination Artifact
insert-automatic-page-numbers.description: Demonstrates adding a pagination artifact that automatically updates page numbers when pages are inserted or removed.

pdf-with-background-template.title: Create PDF with Background Template Page
pdf-with-background-template.description: Demonstrates how to use a PDF page as a background template for all pages in a new document using PdfPageStamp.

add-visible-signature-lock-pdf.title: Add Visible Signature Field and Lock PDF
add-visible-signature-lock-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a visible signature field to a PDF, sign it with a certificate, and lock the document afterwards.

extract-text-pdf.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract all text from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and write it to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

create-pdf-radio-form.title: Create PDF Form with Radio Button Groups
create-pdf-radio-form.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a form with radio button groups for multiple‑choice questions using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

extract-xmp-metadata.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF and Save as XML
extract-xmp-metadata.description: Loads a PDF file, extracts its embedded XMP metadata and writes it to an XML file.

multi-page-table.title: Create Multi‑Page Table in PDF
multi-page-table.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with a table that automatically spans multiple pages using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

add-line-annotation__v2.title: Add Line Annotation as Section Separator
add-line-annotation__v2.description: Demonstrates adding a horizontal line annotation to a PDF page to act as a visual separator between sections.

set-pdf-rotation-90-degrees.title: Set PDF Page Rotation to 90 Degrees
set-pdf-rotation-90-degrees.description: Loads a PDF, sets each page's rotation to 90 degrees for portrait display on landscape devices, and saves the result.

create-pdf-date-picker.title: Create PDF with Date Picker Form Field
create-pdf-date-picker.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF document and add an interactive date picker form field using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

extract-hyperlinks.title: Extract Hyperlinks from PDF to Text File
extract-hyperlinks.description: Extracts all external hyperlink URLs from a PDF document and writes them to a plain text file.

load-pdf-document.title: Load PDF Document with Aspose.Pdf
load-pdf-document.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document object and accessing basic information.

remove-annotations-hidden-data-sanitizer.title: Remove All Annotations Using HiddenDataSanitizerOptions
remove-annotations-hidden-data-sanitizer.description: Demonstrates how to configure HiddenDataSanitizerOptions to strip all annotations from a PDF document.

sanitize-pdf-delete-embedded-scripts.title: Sanitize PDF by Deleting Embedded Scripts
sanitize-pdf-delete-embedded-scripts.description: Demonstrates how to configure HiddenDataSanitizerOptions to remove embedded JavaScript from a PDF before saving.

sanitize-pdf-remove-search-index.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Search Index and Private Info
sanitize-pdf-remove-search-index.description: Demonstrates how to enable the RemoveSearchIndexAndPrivateInfo option to clear metadata and private information from a PDF during sanitization.

convert-pdf-to-html-rasterized.title: Convert PDF Pages to Rasterized Images in HTML
convert-pdf-to-html-rasterized.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF to HTML with each page rasterized as an image by enabling ConvertPagesToImages and setting ImageDpi to 150.

pdf-to-jpeg-quality-80.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images with Quality 80
pdf-to-jpeg-quality-80.description: Demonstrates how to compress images inside a PDF using ImageCompressionOptions and convert each page to a JPEG file with quality set to 80.

pdf-to-images-no-compression.title: Convert PDF Pages to Images without Compression
pdf-to-images-no-compression.description: Demonstrates how to export each PDF page to an image while disabling image compression to preserve the original file size.

batch-convert-pdf-to-images.title: Batch Convert PDF Pages to Images Using HiddenDataSanitizer
batch-convert-pdf-to-images.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's HiddenDataSanitizer to convert each page of a PDF into separate image files while removing hidden data.

hidden-data-sanitizer-selective-rasteriz.title: Configure Hidden Data Sanitizer and Selective Page Rasterization for HTML Conversion
hidden-data-sanitizer-selective-rasteriz.description: Demonstrates creating a HiddenDataSanitizerOptions.All() configuration and enabling page rasterization only for specific pages when converting a PDF to HTML.

remove-annotations-attachments.title: Remove Annotations and Attachments from PDF
remove-annotations-attachments.description: Demonstrates how to strip comments (annotations) and embedded files (attachments) from a PDF using FlattenSettings.

sanitize-multiple-pdfs.title: Sanitize Multiple PDFs and Save Cleaned Versions
sanitize-multiple-pdfs.description: Loads all PDF files from a folder, removes metadata, compliance tags, flattens forms, optimizes resources, and saves cleaned PDFs to a target folder.

generate-crash-report.title: Generate Crash Report for PDF Exception
generate-crash-report.description: Demonstrates catching a PdfException, creating CrashReportOptions, and generating an HTML crash report.

generate-custom-crash-report.title: Generate Custom Crash Report with Message
generate-custom-crash-report.description: Demonstrates how to generate a crash report for an exception, set a custom message, and specify a custom file name using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-crash-report__v2.title: Generate Crash Report and Verify Output Directory
generate-crash-report__v2.description: Demonstrates setting a custom crash report directory, generating a crash report for an exception, and confirming the report file exists.

generate-crash-report__v3.title: Generate Crash Report for Unexpected PDF Errors
generate-crash-report__v3.description: Demonstrates wrapping PDF processing in a try‑catch block and generating a detailed crash report using Aspose.Pdf when an unexpected error occurs.

create-pdf-level-1-heading.title: Create PDF with Level 1 Heading
create-pdf-level-1-heading.description: Creates a new PDF document, adds a level‑1 heading using the tagged PDF API, and saves the file.

apply-decimal-numbering-headings.title: Apply Decimal Numbering to Hierarchical Headings in PDF
apply-decimal-numbering-headings.description: Demonstrates how to create headings with automatic decimal numbering and hierarchical levels using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

insert-heading-outline.title: Insert Heading and Bookmark into PDF Outline
insert-heading-outline.description: Adds a heading text to a page and creates a corresponding outline entry (bookmark) that points to the heading.

dynamic-heading-pdf.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Heading Text
dynamic-heading-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to set a heading with dynamic content such as the current date before saving a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-hidden-data-reapply-headings.title: Remove Hidden Data and Reapply Headings in PDF
remove-hidden-data-reapply-headings.description: Loads a PDF, removes hidden metadata and compliance information, optimizes resources, and re‑applies heading structure using auto‑tagging to preserve navigation.

batch-sanitize-pdfs.title: Batch sanitize PDFs and save cleaned copies
batch-sanitize-pdfs.description: Iterates over a folder of PDF files, removes metadata, flattens forms, strips PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance, optimizes resources, and saves the sanitized PDFs to a separate output directory.

sanitize-pdf.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Data
sanitize-pdf.description: Loads a PDF, removes metadata, PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance information, flattens form fields, and saves a sanitized copy.

check-hidden-annotations.title: Check for Hidden Annotations in PDF
check-hidden-annotations.description: Demonstrates how to detect hidden annotations in a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

sanitize-pdf-hidden-data.title: Sanitize PDF Hidden Data While Preserving Metadata
sanitize-pdf-hidden-data.description: Demonstrates how to configure HiddenDataSanitizerOptions to remove all hidden content from a PDF while keeping its metadata intact.

rasterize-pdf-to-png-with-compression.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to PNG with PNG Compression
rasterize-pdf-to-png-with-compression.description: Demonstrates how to rasterize each page of a PDF to PNG images while setting PNG compression level using ImageCompressionOptions.

pdf-to-tiff-per-page.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution TIFF Images
pdf-to-tiff-per-page.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of a PDF document into separate high-resolution TIFF images using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pages-to-images-flag-test.title: Unit Test for ConvertPagesToImages Flag
convert-pages-to-images-flag-test.description: Verifies that setting PdfConverter.ConvertPagesToImages creates an image file for each PDF page.

sanitize-and-create-headings.title: Sanitize PDF and Generate Heading Structure
sanitize-and-create-headings.description: Loads a PDF, removes metadata and flattens content, enables auto‑tagging to create heading structure, and saves a clean, navigable PDF.

generate-crash-report__v4.title: Generate Crash Report with Custom Message for PDF Errors
generate-crash-report__v4.description: Demonstrates how to catch a PdfException, create CrashReportOptions with a custom message, and generate an HTML crash report for debugging complex PDF operations.

generate-crash-report-network-share.title: Generate Crash Report to Network Share
generate-crash-report-network-share.description: Demonstrates setting CrashReportOptions.CrashReportDirectory to a network share and generating a crash report for an exception.

log-pdf-sanitization.title: Log PDF Sanitization Operation with Timestamps
log-pdf-sanitization.description: Demonstrates how to record start and end times of a PDF sanitization (validation) operation using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.
